blogPosts.title: How to Choose the Right Massage Therapist
blogPosts.excerpt: A simple checklist to find a therapist who matches your goals, budget, and comfort level.
blogPosts.author: MasseurMatch Editorial

blocks.text: Choosing the right therapist starts with clarity: what do you need right now? Relief, recovery, or deep relaxation?
Then compare specialties, session formats, and communication style before booking.

blogPosts.title: Incall vs Outcall: Which Session Type Is Better?
blogPosts.excerpt: Understand the tradeoffs between visiting a studio and booking a therapist to come to you.
blogPosts.author: MasseurMatch Editorial

blocks.text: Incall often offers a fully prepared treatment environment. Outcall gives convenience and privacy at home or hotel.

blogPosts.title: First Session Etiquette: What to Expect
blogPosts.excerpt: A short guide to communication, boundaries, and preparation before your first appointment.
blogPosts.author: MasseurMatch Editorial

blocks.text: Clear communication and mutual respect create better outcomes for both client and therapist.
